what: Set the active project in the navigation store
why: Updates global navigation context so ContextualSidebar renders with project-specific links (Knowledge + Sessions)

decisions.reason: selectProject clears activeVault; no navigation occurs
decisions.rationale: Only one context type active at a time. Sidebar appears reactively — no further step or dialog needed.

decisions.reason: Project sidebar shows Vaults + Sessions, not Knowledge
decisions.rationale: Knowledge is vault-scoped, not project-scoped. When a project is selected the user needs to see which vaults are linked (Vaults link → /vaults filtered by connected_vaults) and navigate to AI sessions (Sessions link). Knowledge is shown when a vault context is active instead.
